name: Spotify Technology S.A.
description: Spotify Technology S.A. is a leading global audio streaming subscription service provider. Headquartered in Luxembourg, the company offers a digital platform that provides access to millions of songs, podcasts, and videos from creators around the world. Spotify operates on a freemium model, offering basic services for free with advertisements, while providing premium subscriptions that allow for ad-free listening, offline playback, and enhanced audio quality. Since its inception, the company has revolutionized the music industry by shifting consumption patterns toward streaming, continuously expanding its content library and technological features to enhance the user experience.
